channel.title: AWS Service Health Dashboard
channel.description: AWS Service Health Dashboard RSS Feed

item.title: Service is operating normally: Amazon EC2 (US-EAST-1)
item.description: The issue has been resolved and the service is operating normally.

item.title: Informational message: Amazon S3 (US-WEST-2)
item.description: We are investigating increased error rates for S3 in us-west-2.
